capabilities.justification: The embeddable TCP server opens a local listener through tcp-runtime so host-language workers can be tested over real sockets.
The embeddable TCP server launches the configured worker command as a child process to prove the cross-language runtime seam.
Tests may read PYTHON to select an explicit Python 3.12 interpreter for the Python Mini Redis example worker process.

justification: This crate intentionally owns the TCP listener and child worker process for language-neutral embeddable TCP server prototypes.
